issues: interior content area is a large flat white/cream zone — sparse icon density reduces visual richness
small icons at native resolution lose legibility (control glyphs ambiguous at 1×)
icon cluster at bottom-center feels stylistically looser than the border craftsmanship
reasoning: Emotional axis (60%): The ornate golden border with corner medallions, warm orange-brown palette, and saturated accent colors (teal gem, pink/red, green) project a friendly Hyrulean toy-diorama warmth — no grim tones, round silhouettes, charming overall mood. Scores ~8/10 on emotion. Technical axis (40%): 1px hard outlines are consistent at all zoom levels; the border shows clean 2–3 tone hard shading (bright gold highlight → mid orange → dark brown shadow); pixels are grid-snapped with no sub-pixel bleed; hand-pixeled irregularity is present. However the interior icons are small and some outlines soften at native size, and the large flat interior background is under-textured relative to Denzi peer panel quality. Scores ~6/10 on technical. Weighted: 0.6×8 + 0.4×6 = 7.2 → 7. Marginal — border frame is pass-quality; interior content needs density, legibility, and texture work to reach full pass.
